title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 147.090 - Taxes and penalties shall be first lien
text:
147.090.  Taxes and penalties shall be first lien. — The taxes and penalties to be paid by the provisions of this chapter shall be a first lien on all property and assets of the corporation within this state.
(RSMo 1939 § 5119, A.L. 1943 p. 410 § 141) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 4647; 1919 § 9842
